meaning: n.脚步,步幅,步调,步伐,步骤,措施,梯级,台阶v.走,举步,移步,踏 产品数据转换规范
examples: There was a bounce to his step.
I took a step toward him.
The U.S. needs an honest-to-God 12-step program to recover its long-term 3.5% annual growth potential.
Before contemplating such an extreme step Bob should obtain independent financial advice in writing.
